name: lobopix
description: Extension de Chrome para galeria de imagenes web y biblioteca manual.

scripts.build:prepare: npm run sync:version && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp src/manifest.json src/popup.html src/popup.css dist/ && cp -R src/assets dist/assets && cp -R src/_locales dist/_locales
scripts.build: npm run build:prepare && npm run build:js
scripts.publish:zip: mkdir -p release && rm -f "release/lobopix-v$npm_package_version.zip" && cd dist && zip -r "../release/lobopix-v$npm_package_version.zip" . -x "*.DS_Store" -x "lobopix-v*.zip"
scripts.publish: npm run build && npm run publish:zip
